emails.subject: Re: EOL Credit Responses 2/2
emails.body: Re: EOL Credit Responses 2/2 Tana: DTE Coal Services Inc. should be restricted by legal since they are restricted by Credit. The other 2 entities are okay to trade U.S. power with Sithe to trade pursuant to on-line GTCs with collateral. Leslie

emails.subject: Re: EOL Credit Responses 2/2
emails.body: Re: EOL Credit Responses 2/2 Tana: DTE Coal Services Inc. should be restricted by legal since they are restricted by Credit. The other 2 entities are okay to trade U.S. power with Sithe to trade pursuant to on-line GTCs with collateral. Leslie

emails.subject: Re: EOL Credit Responses 2/2
emails.body: Re: EOL Credit Responses 2/2 Tana: I am amending my response a bit: The following CPs should be profiled as ENRON SALES only: Minnesota Power, Inc. Southwestern Public Service Company Rhonda: I discussed these CPs with Dana. We have old paper and don't do much volume. Accordingly, these CPs must trade pursuant to the on-line GTCs, which means that they must receive an override letter. Leslie
